trans-unit.source: %count% new products have been synchronized with the API.
trans-unit.target: %count% new products have been synchronized with the API.

trans-unit.source: Use this only if you cannot use the OAuth connection above. We recommend using the "Connect with AI SmartTalk" button instead.
trans-unit.target: Use this only if you cannot use the OAuth connection above. We recommend using the "Connect with AI SmartTalk" button instead.

trans-unit.source: Settings updated. You can now enable product synchronization or use CSV import in AI SmartTalk.
trans-unit.target: Settings updated. You can now enable product synchronization or use CSV import in AI SmartTalk.

trans-unit.source: Deleted and inactive products have been cleaned.
trans-unit.target: Deleted and inactive products have been cleaned.

trans-unit.source: Local customizations cleared. Using AI SmartTalk defaults.
trans-unit.target: Local customizations cleared. Using AI SmartTalk defaults.

trans-unit.source: Integrate AI SmartTalk chatbot to enhance customer support and engagement.
trans-unit.target: Integrate AI SmartTalk chatbot to enhance customer support and engagement.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to uninstall?
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to uninstall?

trans-unit.source: No products found to synchronize. Check that your products are active, in stock (or enable "Include out-of-stock products"), and match your sync filters.
trans-unit.target: No products found to synchronize. Check that your products are active, in stock (or enable "Include out-of-stock products"), and match your sync filters.

trans-unit.source: Failed to synchronize configuration from AI SmartTalk.
trans-unit.target: Failed to synchronize configuration from AI SmartTalk.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred during synchronization with the API.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred during synchronization with the API.

trans-unit.source: Invalid privacy policy URL - must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
trans-unit.target: Invalid privacy policy URL - must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://

trans-unit.source: %count% products have been synchronized with the API.
trans-unit.target: %count% products have been synchronized with the API.

trans-unit.source: Category tree could not be synchronized; product categories will be created on the fly.
trans-unit.target: Category tree could not be synchronized; product categories will be created on the fly.
